faq.title: Questions Before You Start
faq.description: Clear answers about setup, cost, image quality, privacy, and supported devices.

howItWorks.question: How does it work?
howItWorks.answer: Upload 10–20 varied selfies and train your personal AI model once. You can then create new photos of yourself in different outfits, poses, settings, and styles.

sourcePhotos.question: What photos should I upload?
sourcePhotos.answer: Use clear solo selfies with varied angles, expressions, and lighting. Keep your face visible and avoid group photos, heavy filters, sunglasses, and very dark or blurry images.

pricing.question: How much does it cost, and are there limits?
pricing.answer: Training your personal model costs $2.99 once. Each generated image costs $0.03, with no subscription, fixed bundle, or monthly generation limit.

imageQuality.question: What affects image quality?
imageQuality.answer: Clear, varied selfies produce the best likeness. Your prompt and chosen style also affect the result, so you can generate multiple options and keep the strongest images.

privacy.question: How are my photos and data handled?
privacy.answer: You choose whether generated photos are public or private. Photos stay in your account until you delete them, and you can permanently remove individual images or your full library. We do not sell your personal data.

platforms.question: Where can I use My AI Photo Shoot?
platforms.answer: Use it in a web browser or through the native iOS and Android apps. Sign in with the same account to access your generated images across devices.

whyNotChatGPT.question: How is this different from a general AI image tool?
whyNotChatGPT.answer: My AI Photo Shoot is built around a reusable model trained on your selfies. That makes it easier to maintain a recognizable likeness across many headshots, portraits, and profile-photo styles with predictable pay-as-you-go pricing.

useCase.galleryDisclaimer: All examples shown were generated by our AI from user selfies.
